task_completion.description: The custom instrument 'SYNTH101' is defined in NinjaTrader.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Instruments window shows 'SYNTH101' in the list, or the New Instrument dialog is filled with 'SYNTH101', Currency: USD, and Exchange: Default.

task_completion.description: The historical data import is configured with the correct file and format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Historical Data import window is visible, showing the file path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SYNTH101.txt' and the format 'yyyyMMdd;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume'.
A chart window is visible with 'SYNTH101' in the title bar, tab, or chart background.

task_completion.description: The 'SYNTH101' chart is set to a Daily interval.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart window indicates a 'Daily' or '1 Day' (or 'D') interval in its title, tab, or toolbar.
The Workspaces dropdown menu is open with the user clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or a workspace save dialog/confirmation is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NinjaTrader 8 application windows (Control Center, Instruments, Historical Data, Chart) being actively used, rather than editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The chart window actually belongs to NinjaTrader.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window has the standard NinjaTrader 8 UI elements, toolbars, and styling, and is not a mock-up or an image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent didn't use external scripts to bypass the GUI steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing PowerShell or Python scripts being executed to directly modify NinjaTrader's internal database or workspace XML files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument name: SYNTH101. Data file path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SYNTH101.txt. Data format: yyyyMMdd;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume. Expected chart interval: Daily. Workspaces directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. Note: NinjaTrader allows custom instrument names. The daily OHLCV format is standard for NinjaTrader.
